metadata.title: Solbion | Materials Discovery Platform
metadata.description: The autonomous engine for materials discovery. We combine combinatorial synthesis, automated metrology, and active learning to map chemical spaces at unprecedented velocity.

hero_section.headline: Mapping the physical world at the speed of software.
hero_section.subheadline: High-throughput materials discovery. Zero human bottlenecks. We bridge the commercialization gap for scientific research by turning the laboratory into an autonomous data factory.

problem_section.heading: The 10-Year Bottleneck
problem_section.body: Every breakthrough in your product roadmap is currently waiting on a material science bottleneck. Sequential, human-driven trial-and-error is obsolete. Guessing in an infinite multi-dimensional chemical space costs millions and takes decades.

solution_section.heading: Don't guess. Map the material space.
solution_section.body: Solbion operates as a Lab-as-a-Service (LaaS). You provide the performance targets. Our Python-driven active learning loops and closed-loop Bayesian optimization autonomously synthesize, measure, and iterate up to 500 alloy combinations a week.

benefits.title: 10x Speed-to-Data
benefits.description: Collapse 6 to 9 months of traditional sequential testing into a two-week combinatorial PVD screening campaign.

benefits.title: De-risking-as-a-Service
benefits.description: We don't just find the winning material; we map the negative space. Save millions in downstream R&D by definitively charting where your team should not look.

benefits.title: Machine-Readable Telemetry
benefits.description: Escape fragmented ELNs. Receive structurally unified, perfectly logged metadata ready to plug directly into your internal AI models.

steps.title: Define Targets
steps.description: Set precise thermodynamic, electrical, or structural parameters for your next-generation semiconductor layer or non-PGM catalyst.

steps.title: Autonomous Synthesis
steps.description: Our hardware executes continuous combinatorial spreads, building vast libraries of physical samples without manual intervention.

steps.title: Active Orchestration
steps.description: Automated metrology feeds structural data back to the orchestration layer, allowing the system to learn and adapt the next synthesis run in real-time.

bottom_cta_section.heading: Ready to accelerate your product roadmap?
bottom_cta_section.body: Don't spend the next two years blindly searching. Let us map the space for you in two weeks.
